new_cascade_issues.title: Power margin reduction
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel reduces power generation capacity, potentially exceeding peak power consumption limits during imaging mode.

new_cascade_issues.title: Mass reduction below budget
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel reduces total payload mass, potentially exceeding the mass budget and affecting overall system balance.

new_cascade_issues.title: Thermal imbalance
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel may cause thermal imbalances, affecting temperature stability and potentially violating ΔT limits across orbital cycles.

new_cascade_issues.title: Structural integrity impact
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel affects structural balance and may require reanalysis of mechanical constraints, including shock response.

new_missing_tests.activity: Thermal balance test to validate TMM with modified solar panel configuration
new_missing_tests.reason: Removing the right solar panel impacts thermal management and requires revalidation of thermal margins.

new_missing_tests.activity: Shock test per launcher SRS ICD with modified payload configuration
new_missing_tests.reason: Removing the right solar panel affects structural balance and requires revalidation of shock response.
